playbook.intent: Solo founder takes one raw idea from notebook to a paid landing page + working MVP with first 5 paying users; exit when a written go/no-go decision is in hand backed by problem evidence, scoped spec, shipped product, and at least 5 paying customers (or a clean kill).
playbook.scope: Solo founder takes one raw idea from notebook to a paid landing page + working MVP with first 5 paying users; exit when a written go/no-go decision is in hand backed by problem evidence, scoped spec, shipped product, and at least 5 paying customers (or a clean kill).

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Discovery
stage.intent: From multiple raw ideas to one chosen problem with documented JTBD.

tasks.task: Generate 5-10 idea variants from your domain pain
Score each on founder-market fit and pain frequency
Write a JTBD statement for the top candidate

stage.decision-gate: Advance if top idea scores >=7/10 on founder fit AND pain frequency. Else pick the next candidate.

stage.name: Problem validation
stage.intent: Confirm the pain is real and severe before any build commitment.

tasks.task: Recruit 10 prospects from cold + warm channels
Run Mom-test-style problem interviews (no pitch)
Tag each transcript with severity and frequency

stage.decision-gate: Advance if >=7/10 confirm pain is top-3 in their workflow. Pivot variant if 4-6. Kill if <=3.

stage.name: Willingness to pay
stage.intent: Get specific pricing commitments before code.

tasks.task: Run 5 follow-up calls with the top-pain segment
Ask would you pay $X today with a concrete number
Capture verbatim pricing reactions

stage.decision-gate: Advance if >=3/5 say yes at $X today with a concrete number. Re-price if vague. Kill if every call softens.

stage.name: Spec
stage.intent: Smallest possible build scope with explicit cuts.

tasks.task: Write a 1-page spec covering only the validated workflow
List explicit non-goals and cuts
Define acceptance criteria per feature

stage.decision-gate: Advance if spec fits on one page AND every feature maps to an acceptance criterion.

stage.name: Build
stage.intent: Working MVP that delivers the validated value, nothing more.

tasks.task: Implement spec items in dependency order
Deploy to a real URL daily, however ugly
Skip anything not blocking first payment

stage.decision-gate: Advance when a stranger can complete the workflow without help.

stage.name: Beta
stage.intent: 5 friendly users run the MVP under real conditions.

tasks.task: Invite 5 prospects from Discovery
Observe usage without pre-explaining
Log every confusion point and bug

stage.decision-gate: Advance if >=3/5 reach the value moment unaided. Iterate UX if 1-2. Re-spec if 0.

stage.name: Launch
stage.intent: Paid landing page live; first paying users converted.

tasks.task: Build paid landing with Stripe checkout
Convert beta users to paying customers
Open public sign-up and ship to 2 channels

stage.decision-gate: Advance if >=5 paying customers within 14 days post-launch.

stage.name: Decide

tasks.task: Compile evidence trail (interviews + metrics + paying-user feedback)
Write explicit continue/pivot/kill decision
If continue, define the next 30-day milestone

stage.decision-gate: Required output is a written decision - no maybe, no see how it goes.

stage.name: Reflexion
stage.intent: Capture lessons into pattern + mistake memory.

tasks.task: Write 1-page reflexion on what worked and what did not
Update pattern memory with reusable assets
Update mistake memory with traps to avoid next cycle

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when reflexion is committed and memories updated.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content idea-validated-mvp-launch --format md, agent: faion get-content idea-validated-mvp-launch --format context, json: faion get-content idea-validated-mvp-launch --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
